series_metadata.series_title: Special Use Permits and District Permits Involving Research Permits and/or Extensive Land Use
series_metadata.series_description: Records used to authorize public meetings and events on state forest property and provide for waiver of rules as allowed in the Ohio Administrative Code. This series includes research permits, right-of-ways, or other extensive land use permits.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep for five years from date of expiration, then destroy. ; Paper: Keep for five years from date of expiration, then destroy. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
